# Manager Agent Lessons

- Split large work into smaller units before delegating.
- Fan out to specialist agents when tasks touch many files.
- Reconcile shared assumptions after specialists return.
- Use wrapper prompts with agent name, spec path, base path, acceptance criteria, and expected return summary whenever delegating work.
- Update shared lessons when a finding applies across the whole workflow.
- Keep the final result consistent across all slices of the task.
- When importing an external bundle into the repo, validate what landed before merging it with local customizations.
